overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian desert shantytown. The journey progresses from an open industrial container yard through a dark neon-lit alley, into populated courtyards with makeshift structures, and finally through a large industrial gate. The environment features high-quality ray-traced lighting with strong shadows and dust effects.

small wooden structure with anime poster on the side
tall metal scaffolding attached to distant building
thick yellow hose lying across the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a sunlit industrial container yard with sparse vegetation and dirt ground. A gray shipping container sits to the right with figures perched on top, while a green wooden shed with an anime poster appears ahead. The camera moves steadily forward toward a narrow passage between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with overhead walkways

events.description: entering deep shadow as the alley walls block direct sunlight
approaching the bright exit at the end of the dark alleyway

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow dark passage between high concrete walls

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete walls forming a narrow corridor
horizontal red neon light mounted on the left wall
metal walkway bridge connecting buildings overhead
white steam venting from pipes on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow enclosed alleyway where tall concrete walls block the sky, creating a low-light environment. Red neon strips and steam vents line the left wall while an overhead metal bridge spans the passage. The camera moves through the shadows toward a bright exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift courtyard with modular office building

events.description: entering populated area with NPCs gathered near the office building
slowing slightly to navigate around the building entrance and NPCs

person standing on upper scaffolding platform

entered.detail: beige portable office structure with turquoise trim and metal stairs
orange metal stairs with railings leading to upper platform
large cylindrical white water tank on metal stand
rusted corrugated metal barrier with graffiti

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into a semi-open courtyard, the player encounters a modular office building with turquoise trim surrounded by NPCs. Metal scaffolding with orange railings stands to the left while a water tank sits to the right. The ground is dusty dirt with scattered weeds, and several characters are gathered near the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial path with shipping containers and scaffolding

events.description: moving from the courtyard into a more industrial corridor with green containers

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the dirt path past groups of NPCs gathered around tables

notable_agents.action: group of three people gathered around a white plastic table with drinks

entered.detail: large green metal shipping container with graffiti art
tall orange scaffolding tower with platforms
striped orange and white concrete road barriers
tall industrial metal wall with rust patterns

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the courtyard into a dirt path corridor lined with industrial elements. Green shipping containers stand to the right while orange scaffolding towers rise on the left. Groups of NPCs sit at plastic tables in the shade, and orange concrete barriers mark the path ahead toward a large gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial gate passage with overhead signage

events.description: passing through the large yellow industrial gate structure
entering area with visible neon signage and atmospheric dust effects

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate into a new zone with neon signs and distant structures

entered.detail: large yellow metal gate structure with overhead walkway
neon sign with 'MONKEY' text above the gate entrance
vertical red neon sign reading 'SKYLON' on left building
striped yellow and black concrete barriers flanking the gate

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and passes through a massive yellow industrial gate marked with a 'MONKEY' neon sign. Concrete barricades flank the entrance, and atmospheric dust fills the air. Beyond the gate, a red 'SKYLON' neon sign glows on the left as the path continues into another enclosed urban corridor with overhead cables and industrial structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit industrial yard through a claustrophobic neon alley and into a bustling shantytown. It begins by moving through a bright container yard past a green wooden shed and perched figures before narrowing into a dark, enclosed alleyway defined by red neon strips and steam vents. As the camera emerges from the shadows into a semi-open courtyard, the environment expands to reveal modular buildings with turquoise trim and NPCs gathered around metal scaffolding. The path then shifts into a dusty corridor lined with orange barriers and green containers where residents sit at plastic tables in the shade. Finally, the camera passes through a massive yellow industrial gate marked with a Monkey neon sign, moving into a hazy urban corridor illuminated by a glowing red Skylon sign and overhead cables.
